# Dedalus Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "dedalus" {
  api_key = "My API Key"
  x_api_key = "My X API Key"
  dedalus_org_id = "My Dedalus Org ID"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String)
- `base_url` (String) Set the base url that the provider connects to.
- `dedalus_org_id` (String)
- `x_api_key` (String)
